fsymId.description: FactSet Security Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -S suffix (XXXXXX-S), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

oneWeek.description: The one-week return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

oneMonth.description: The one-month return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

threeMonth.description: The three-month return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

yearToDate.description: The year-to-date return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

oneYear.description: The one-year return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

threeYear.description: The three-year return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

threeYearAnnualized.description: The three-year annualized return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

fiveYear.description: The five-year return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

fiveYearAnnualized.description: The five year annualized return for the requested id and date. The return type is determined by including or excluding dividends through the dividendAdjust parameter.

date.description: The date of the return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

requestId.description: The requested Id sent as input.
